rawPrompt:
This is the wrapper project. It's intention is to deploy a globally available local gemma-4 or equally or higher advanced model optimized for the use case , according to whatever pc / spec the person is running. User can chose to upgrade to higher model. 
The purpose is , there should be always be some sort of seamless context handoff available and updated time to time as the chat progresses. Sometimes user is lazy or just doesn't want to optimize the prompt and feed the context. Leading to garbage in and garbage out if the "working model" treats the prompt as is, and user has not "prompted" to follow best practice or to grill him on questions , leading to unrealiable outputs. 
The local gemma model would hence be able to do the prompt refinement and context feed correctly, so user can be rest assured he doesn't have to add two steps between each prompt, leading to faster TAT and hgiher quality outputs when doing spec-driven-development using modern vibe coding practices. Implement other data backed practices such as folder segregation , maintaining yaml etc.
